request: How does order size vary by shipping method?
search_document:
User Request: How does order size vary by shipping method?

Dashboard Components:
Title: Order Size by Shipping Method
Type: chart
Description: Comparison of average order size across different shipping methods
Title: Shipping Method Breakdown
Type: table
Description: Summary of orders by shipping method, including total orders and average order size
Title: Total Orders by Shipping Method
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of orders categorized by shipping method

sql_queries.title: Order Size by Shipping Method
sql_queries.description: Comparison of average order size across different shipping methods
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Shippers.CompanyName AS ShippingMethod, AVG(OrderDetails.Quantity * OrderDetails.UnitPrice * (1 - OrderDetails.Discount)) AS AverageOrderSize FROM Orders JOIN [Order Details] AS OrderDetails ON Orders.OrderID = OrderDetails.OrderID JOIN Shippers ON Orders.ShipVia = Shippers.ShipperID GROUP BY Shippers.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Shipping Method Breakdown
sql_queries.description: Summary of orders by shipping method, including total orders and average order size
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Shippers.CompanyName AS ShippingMethod, COUNT(Orders.OrderID) AS TotalOrders, AVG(OrderDetails.Quantity * OrderDetails.UnitPrice * (1 - OrderDetails.Discount)) AS AverageOrderSize FROM Orders JOIN [Order Details] AS OrderDetails ON Orders.OrderID = OrderDetails.OrderID JOIN Shippers ON Orders.ShipVia = Shippers.ShipperID GROUP BY Shippers.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Total Orders by Shipping Method
sql_queries.description: Total number of orders categorized by shipping method
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Shippers.CompanyName AS ShippingMethod, COUNT(Orders.OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Orders JOIN Shippers ON Orders.ShipVia = Shippers.ShipperID GROUP BY Shippers.CompanyName
